items.name: falcon
items.description: A blazing-fast, secure download manager for Windows, macOS,          + and Linux. Supports HTTP/HTTPS, FTP, BitTorrent, cloud storage          +  (AWS S3, Alibaba Cloud), and private protocols (Thunder,          + QQDL). Features multi-threaded downloads, encrypted          + credentials, and resume support. Open source C++ application.
